note: Library visit: general admission + specialty tours. Tours from trlibrary.com/visit/tours. avail.fixed = time-anchored departures the scheduler places on matching weekdays (days: 0=Sun..6=Sat). price in USD. duration in minutes.
hoursNote: Now open — check trlibrary.com/visit for current daily hours and seasonal changes.

generalAdmission.name: General Admission
generalAdmission.blurb: Self-guided, full access to the galleries and grounds on your own schedule. Includes the Boardwalk overlooking the Little Missouri.

tours.name: Guided Highlights Tour
tours.blurb: An engaging overview of Theodore Roosevelt's life and the Library's mission and design. Indoors & outdoors.

tours.name: Architecture and Sustainability Tour
tours.blurb: How the Library honors TR's conservation legacy through its own design — sustainable materials, land stewardship, and architecture shaped by the landscape. Indoors & outdoors.

tours.name: Badlands Landscape Tour
tours.blurb: The striking natural features of the Badlands and the native plants that call it home, ending with a seasonal offering from Salt + Scoria. Mostly outdoors.

tours.name: T.R. Deep-Dive Tour
tours.blurb: Theodore Roosevelt's life through the objects he left behind — what material culture reveals about his identity, philosophy, and legacy. Indoors.

tours.name: Members-Only "Behind the Arena" Tour
tours.blurb: An exclusive, members-only behind-the-scenes look at the Library. Offered select dates (e.g. July 6–31). Indoors & outdoors.

options.name: Founding Membership
options.blurb: Become a founding member and support the Library (and unlock members-only tours).
